title: Create acp-mapper.ts for ACP to AG-UI mapping
acceptance_criteria: Maps ACP ToolCall to AG-UI ToolCallStartEvent
Maps ACP AgentMessageChunk to AG-UI TextMessageContentEvent
Maps ACP ToolCallUpdate.Status to AG-UI ToolCallResultEvent
Uses existing mapper.ts patterns as reference
completion_summary: Created acp-mapper.ts with 3 functions: mapACPTextToAGUI, mapACPToolCallToAGUI, mapACPToolResultToAGUI
